Custom Reunion Banner Options for All School Celebrations

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your next event with an eye-catching vinyl banner. From trade shows and in-store displays to family reunions and parades, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom vinyl banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to hang. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made vinyl banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom vinyl banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it. Get started on your order today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Material Selection for Reunion Banner Durability

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Reunion Banner Installation

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets

These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet.

Reinforced Hems

A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement.

Reinforced Corners

A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners.

Pole Pockets

A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Reunion Banner Production & Delivery Schedules

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Reunion Banners

Payment

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Reunion Banner Orders

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

  • Seasonal sales

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Reunion Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Reunion Banners for Your Next School Event

Custom banners are a great addition to All School Reunions! Get a custom banner with your school's name and logo and the graduating classes in attendance to display at the reunion. Use banners to mark the location of your reunion, welcome attendees, and thank everyone for coming. Hang banners all around town to celebrate the occasion and direct people to various activities and events. We have templates ready to customize, or you can start with a blank template and design your banner from scratch. You can also upload a print-ready file or have one of our graphic designers create a banner for you. Whatever signage you need for your All School Reunion, Banners.com has you covered!

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service
Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround
Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

Quality Products
Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking
Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color banners take your event to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability. Request a quote and start your design, today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Reunion Banners

What material is best for outdoor reunion banners?

For outdoor reunion banners, we recommend our 13 oz matte vinyl or 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl for extra durability. If you're dealing with windy conditions, mesh banners with 37% airflow are ideal.

How long does it take to produce a custom reunion banner?

We offer flexible production times ranging from 1-5 business days. Choose the timeline that works best for your reunion schedule.

Can you help design my reunion banner?

Yes! Our professional graphic designers can create a custom design for your reunion banner. Simply provide us with your specifications and any logos or images you'd like included.

What sizes are available for reunion banners?

We offer sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger sizes, please contact us for a custom quote.

Do you offer templates for reunion banners?

Yes, we have pre-designed templates specifically for reunions that you can customize with your school's information, dates, and colors.

What finishing options work best for hanging reunion banners?

For easy hanging, we recommend hems with grommets spaced every 2-4 feet. For pole mounting, consider our pole pocket options in 2", 3", or 4" sizes.

How should I prepare my artwork for printing?

The best file format is .eps converted to outline, but we also accept high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files. Our team will review your artwork and contact you if any adjustments are needed.

Can I get a proof before my banner is printed?

Absolutely! We offer order proofs that show a low-resolution image of your artwork along with order details. Production won't begin until you approve the proof.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
